name: Brightbill Park
description: Courts were renovated in June 2024, 8 courts with 8 portable nets.   Very popular place to play.

name: Calvary United Methodist Church
description: They do not rent the court out. Not for public use

name: Conewago Courts
description: Conewago Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elizabethtown, PA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Country Club of Harrisburg
description: Country Club of Harrisburg is a place to play pickleball in Harrisburg, PA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and water.

name: Derry Township Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Derry Township Community Center in Hershey, PA! There are 10 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: East Hanover Municipal Park
description: East Hanover Municipal Park is a place to play pickleball in Grantville, PA. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Friendship YMCA
description: Friendship YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Harrisburg, PA. There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Gerald Vanetta Park
description: Gerald Vanetta Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lawnton, PA. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Harrisburg Area Community College (HACC)
description: Harrisburg Area Community College (HACC) is a place to play pickleball in Harrisburg, PA. There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Koons Memorial Park
description: Koons Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harrisburg, PA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Northern Dauphin County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Northern Dauphin County YMCA in Elizabethville, PA! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Susquehanna Township Veterans Park
description: Susquehanna Township Veterans Park is a place to play pickleball in Harrisburg, PA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: The Recreational Outreach Center
description: Come play pickleball at The Recreational Outreach Center in Millersburg, PA! There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: Open to all that sign a required waiver
